title: エリザベス女王杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: TV Audio
text_block_list.text:
"Princess, I know that you can become a great
queen. It will be all right—go and tell everyone
how you truly feel."

text_block_list.name: TV Audio
text_block_list.text:
"Princess, I know that you can become a great
queen. It will be all right—go and tell everyone
how you truly feel."

text_block_list.name: TV Audio
text_block_list.text: "Of course. I must share these feelings of mine with Dark Princess—no, with my friend."

text_block_list.name: TV Audio
text_block_list.text:
"So please watch over me... as I become a brilliant
queen!"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: It's finally here! The Queen Elizabeth II Cup!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
H... Hyugh... Trainer?! What do I do?! I... this
race...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ha-hah! You're scared stiff! And after all that big
talk about strolling into first.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Can you even run in that sorry state? Guess I'm
taking the prize this year too!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I'm not letting you take first place! You'll
be left speechless when this is all over!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Well, then do your worst—if you can, that is! Hehe, this is gonna be fun!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win, Trainer! No true princess would
let her dream race slip through her fingers!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can let Sweep win this one!

text_block_list.name: Lady in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
So this time of year has arrived again. Another
superb race symbolizing strength, radiance, and
beauty.

text_block_list.name: Lady with Hat
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I'm eager to see the coronation of another
Umamusume fit for the title of queen, like Mejiro
Dober and Fine Motion.

text_block_list.name: Lady in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Whoever emerges as queen, I hope
it's someone I can wholeheartedly admire.
